entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cultivated Cicer arietinum L. used in breeding programs to incorporate traits from wild relatives

entities.name: WILD CICER RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild annual relatives of chickpea used as sources of desired traits

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE
entities.description: In vitro technique used to rescue hybrid embryos from abortion and enable plant regeneration

entities.name: PLANT REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of developing hybrid plantlets from rescued embryos in vitro

entities.name: POST-ZYGOTIC BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological barriers that result in the abortion of immature embryos following interspecific hybridisation

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDISATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different species to transfer desired traits

entities.name: OPTICAL MICROSCOPY
entities.description: Imaging technique used to study the process of embryogenesis in selfs and hybrids

entities.name: EMBRYOGENESIS
entities.description: The process of embryo development from fertilization to maturity

entities.name: CICER BIJUGUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used in hybridisation studies

entities.name: GLOBULAR STAGE
entities.description: An early stage of embryogenesis occurring 2-7 days after pollination

entities.name: TISSUE CULTURE MEDIUM
entities.description: A complex nutrient medium required for the rescue of embryos at the globular stage

entities.name: CICER PINNATIFIDUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea that aborts embryos later than C. bijugum

entities.name: HEART-SHAPED STAGE
entities.description: A stage of embryogenesis occurring later than the globular stage

entities.name: TORPEDO STAGE
entities.description: A stage of embryogenesis occurring later than the heart-shaped stage

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic constitution of an individual influencing the ability of ovules to germinate in vitro

entities.name: OVULE GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of immature selfed ovules germinating in vitro

relationships.description: used to transfer desired traits into
used to transfer desired traits from
